mood: studio bodies dragging the web through a cool optical tank
material_language: white studio backdrop paper with hard crop edges
glossy submerged acetate and pool-surface distortion
thin ink-caption strips and cropped tweet residue
lighting: broad softbox studio light crossing into aqua underglow, with charcoal side shadow and tiny flash catches on apertures
object_inventory: one diagonal carry-and-reach procession spanning the plate
submerged lower band bending source marks below a waterline
reference-sheet compartments cut into limb-like slabs
low bench-compression block where two forms lean across a gap
tiny square glints and mask-like interruptions at joints and edges
negative_constraints: no dashboard, browser wall, office room, desk, shelf, cabinet, gallery grid, or summary cards
no legible words, filenames, interface labels, alphanumeric callouts, logos, or page chrome inside the finished image
do not depict the reference photograph literally or reproduce identifiable subjects
avoid garden, glasshouse, hotel, cafe, ship, library, and polite flat paper-scan worlds
do not make every source equal weight; exactly two anchors should read hero-scale
no equal-weight grid of source objects
no literal depiction of the source reference image
